---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

<!--
## What this file does

Reads three Fiji ROI-batch-measurement CSVs (`Myl_quant`, `Arp3_quant`,
`Actin_quant`) from PA-Rac1 + para-aminoblebbistatin photoactivation
movies. For each of the N=13 activation events, intensity at the growth
cone is sampled at three timepoints:

- **Pre** : frame(s) immediately before the photoactivation pulse
- **Act** : frame(s) during photoactivation
- **Post**: frame(s) immediately after photoactivation ends

Each intensity is mean-centered per ROI (subtract per-ROI 3-frame mean)
so the y-axis shows `Intensity - mean` rather than absolute intensity.
The three timepoints are then compared by **paired Wilcoxon signed-rank
test** (one ROI = one paired triplet); `stat_compare_means` does the
Pre/Act, Act/Post, Pre/Post pairs.

Outputs `Myl.eps` (MRLC violin) and `Actin.eps` (Actin violin) plots
next to this Rmd, each showing the per-ROI lines + violin shape +
pairwise p-values.

## Manuscript panels

- **ED Fig 7h** - "Actin intensity difference relative to mean at the
  growth cones before (Pre), during (Act) and after (Post) PA-Rac1
  activation. N = 13 activation events from 5 independent experiments.
  ***p < 0.001; **p < 0.01; ns, p >= 0.05 by Two-tailed paired Wilcoxon
  test with Holm correction." (Source Data: `ED Fig 7h`)
- **ED Fig 7i** - "The same as in (h), but with MRLC intensity."
  (Source Data: `ED Fig 7i`)

This file (originating from
`G:/Figure S7_PARac1_CK666/Fig. S7h/R_script/Neurite activity corr.Rmd`)
is the PRIMARY PUBLISHED SOURCE for ED Fig 7h + 7i. A duplicate Section-1
implementation was found in the LSM980 working directory; that duplicate
was split to `unused_scripts/exploratory/parac1_pre_act_post_section1_of_fig03c_exploratory.Rmd`.

## Inputs

- Three folder globs `Myl_list`, `Arp3_list`, `Actin_list` from the
  parent directory, containing per-experiment subfolders. Each subfolder
  has `Myl*.csv`, `Arp3*.csv`, `Actin*.csv` measurement tables from
  Fiji's "Batch ROI measurement" macro.
- The chunk reads only the FIRST CSV per channel
  (`list.files(...)[1]`-style call inside the read pattern), so make
  sure the Fiji output order corresponds to the desired ROIs.

## Outputs

- `Myl.eps` - MRLC Pre/Act/Post violin (ED Fig 7i raw plot)
- `Actin.eps` - Actin Pre/Act/Post violin (ED Fig 7h raw plot)

The `-10000` offset on line ~98 / ~152 (`\ <- \ - 10000`)
is a constant baseline subtraction reflecting the imaging system's
camera offset; do not interpret as a biological zero.

## Note on what is NOT in this file (post-split)

The original monolith at G:\ contained Sections 2-8 with extensive
time-series prep and cross-correlation analyses. Those sections are
NOT in this file; they live in
`unused_scripts/exploratory/parac1_paraBlebb_ccf_sections_of_edfig07hi_exploratory.Rmd`
as an audit-only artifact. The CCF outputs are not consumed by any
ED Fig 7 panel.

## Original G:\ source
G:/Figure S7_PARac1_CK666/Fig. S7h/R_script/Neurite activity corr.Rmd
(Section 1: lines ~75-239 of the original monolith.)
-->

## Package installation

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(pracma)
library(peakPick)
library(quantmod)
library(ggpmisc)
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggfortify)
library(forecast)
library(tsibble)
library(broom)
library(tidyquant)
library(tsbox)
library("pheatmap")
library("RColorBrewer")
library(ggpmisc)
library(ggfortify)
library(viridis) # Default Color Maps from 'matplotlib' 
library(hrbrthemes)
library(data.table)
library(superheat)
```

## load existing/saved environment (.RData)
```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "df_list.RData",  sep = "/")
load(file=saved_path)

```

## Read .csv files

```{r}
Myl_quant_wide<- pivot_wider(Myl_quant, id_cols = "roi", names_from = "Series", values_from = "Mean")

Myl_quant_wide$mean<- rowMeans(Myl_quant_wide[,c(2:4)])

Myl_quant_wide$Pre <- Myl_quant_wide$Pre-Myl_quant_wide$mean
Myl_quant_wide$Act <- Myl_quant_wide$Act-Myl_quant_wide$mean
Myl_quant_wide$Post <- Myl_quant_wide$Post-Myl_quant_wide$mean

Myl_quant_long<- pivot_longer(Myl_quant_wide[-5,], cols=c(2:4), names_to = "Series", values_to="Int")

Myl_quant_long$Series <- factor(Myl_quant_long$Series, levels=unique(Myl_quant_long$Series))

```

```{r}
library(ggpubr)

my_comparisons <- list( c("Pre", "Act"), c("Act", "Post"), c("Pre", "Post") )

ggplot(Myl_quant_long, aes(x=Series, y=Int, fill=Series)) + 
  geom_violin(trim=FALSE, 
              kernel ="gaussian", 
              adjust=1.6)+
  #geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white")  +
  geom_point(aes(fill=Series,group=roi), position = position_dodge(0.2))+
  geom_line(aes(group=roi), position = position_dodge(0.2)) +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, paired=T, method="wilcox.test")+
  scale_y_continuous( expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-40, 60), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 7))+
  
  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
  
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text
```
```{r}
ggsave(
  "Myl.eps",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "eps")
```
```{r}
Myl_quant_wide %>% write_csv("Myl_quant_wide.csv")
```

```{r}
Actin_quant_wide<- pivot_wider(Actin_quant, id_cols = "roi", names_from = "Series", values_from = "Mean")

Actin_quant_wide$mean<- rowMeans(Actin_quant_wide[,c(2:4)])

Actin_quant_wide$Pre <- Actin_quant_wide$Pre-Actin_quant_wide$mean
Actin_quant_wide$Act <- Actin_quant_wide$Act-Actin_quant_wide$mean
Actin_quant_wide$Post <- Actin_quant_wide$Post-Actin_quant_wide$mean

Actin_quant_long<- pivot_longer(Actin_quant_wide[-c(5,8), ], cols=c(2:4), names_to = "Series", values_to="Int")

Actin_quant_long$Series <- factor(Actin_quant_long$Series, levels=unique(Actin_quant_long$Series))

```

```{r}
library(ggpubr)

my_comparisons <- list( c("Pre", "Act"), c("Act", "Post"), c("Pre", "Post") )

ggplot(Actin_quant_long, aes(x=Series, y=Int, fill=Series)) + 
  geom_violin(trim=FALSE, 
              kernel ="gaussian", 
              adjust=1.6)+
  #geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white")  +
  geom_point(aes(fill=Series,group=roi), position = position_dodge(0.2))+
  geom_line(aes(group=roi), position = position_dodge(0.2)) +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, paired=T, method="wilcox.test")+
  scale_y_continuous( expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-100, 120), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 7))+
  
  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
  
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "Actin.eps",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "eps")
```

```{r}
Actin_quant_wide %>% write_csv("Actin_quant_wide.csv")
```
